title: AI in Education — The State of the Art
subtitle: A Living Book in One Hundred Questions
author: António
voicePrompt: Write in clear, elegant, essayistic prose for an educated general reader. Be precise and intellectually honest: distinguish established fact from open debate. Avoid hype, avoid bullet points, avoid AI-sounding filler phrases. Each answer should read as a self-contained short essay of 300-500 words. Never use first person.
